# Weaponized lights

Parents: Magic lights job (Magic%20lights%20job%202e058e628ba280e7b11feb451b4f28c0.md)
Priority: Low
Products: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

Since the Light company’s [Lights catch on fire](Lights%20catch%20on%20fire%202e058e628ba280adab44f7732cc87820.md), some party uses the lights as a weapon, such as to burn a building down (arson).
